mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_usage_daily (statDate, userId, deviceId, roleId, provider, serviceType, requestCount, promptTokens, completionTokens, totalTokens, avgLatencyMs, errorCount) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{roleId}, #{provider}, #{serviceType}, #{requestCount}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{avgLatencyMs}, #{errorCount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE requestCount = requestCount + VALUES(requestCount), promptTokens = promptTokens + VALUES(promptTokens), completionTokens = completionTokens + VALUES(completionTokens), totalTokens = totalTokens + VALUES(totalTokens), avgLatencyMs = CASE WHEN requestCount + VALUES(requestCount) > 0 THEN (avgLatencyMs * requestCount + VALUES(avgLatencyMs) * VALUES(requestCount)) / (requestCount + VALUES(requestCount)) ELSE 0 END, errorCount = errorCount + VALUES(errorCount)
mapper.select:
SELECT statDate,
userId AS groupKey, deviceId AS groupKey, roleId AS groupKey, provider AS groupKey, serviceType AS groupKey,
serviceType, SUM(requestCount) AS requestCount, SUM(promptTokens) AS promptTokens, SUM(completionTokens) AS completionTokens, SUM(totalTokens) AS totalTokens, CASE WHEN SUM(requestCount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(avgLatencyMs * requestCount) / SUM(requestCount)) ELSE 0 END AS avgLatencyMs, SUM(errorCount) AS errorCount FROM sys_usage_daily WHERE statDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND userId = #{userId} GROUP BY statDate,
userId, deviceId, roleId, provider, serviceType,
serviceType ORDER BY statDate ASC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN serviceType = 'llm' THEN requestCount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalLlmCalls, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN serviceType = 'stt' THEN requestCount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalSttCalls, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN serviceType = 'tts' THEN requestCount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalTtsCalls, COALESCE(SUM(requestCount), 0) AS totalCalls, COALESCE(SUM(promptTokens), 0) AS totalPromptTokens, COALESCE(SUM(completionTokens), 0) AS totalCompletionTokens, COALESCE(SUM(totalTokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COALESCE(SUM(errorCount), 0) AS totalErrors, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN serviceType = 'llm' THEN requestCount ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN serviceType = 'llm' THEN avgLatencyMs * requestCount ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN serviceType = 'llm' THEN requestCount ELSE 0 END)) ELSE 0 END AS avgLlmLatencyMs FROM sys_usage_daily WHERE statDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND userId = #{userId}

SELECT statDate, serviceType, CASE WHEN SUM(requestCount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(avgLatencyMs * requestCount) / SUM(requestCount)) ELSE 0 END AS avgLatencyMs, SUM(requestCount) AS requestCount FROM sys_usage_daily WHERE statDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND serviceType = #{serviceType} AND userId = #{userId} GROUP BY statDate, serviceType ORDER BY statDate ASC

SELECT deviceId, SUM(requestCount) AS totalRequests, MAX(statDate) AS lastActiveDate, COUNT(DISTINCT statDate) AS activeDays FROM sys_usage_daily WHERE statDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND deviceId IS NOT NULL AND userId = #{userId} GROUP BY deviceId ORDER BY totalRequests DESC LIMIT 50
